//exclude-note: bench/run.ts is the standalone CLI entry — it imports air-ts by relative SOURCE path (not the bare specifier), which would pull air-ts's source tree into THIS program and break rootDir. It is typechecked under bench/tsconfig.bench.json (the same config tsx uses), not here. The other bench modules consume air-ts only via ../src (through the runtime's EngineHooks seam), so they typecheck cleanly here.
